name: bandit.scout_stalker_sight_avoid_live
description: Bandit live product matrix scenario 6: staged from the exposed-scout/stalker fixture with active sortie metadata repaired to scout, preflight saved active-member footing and saved turn baseline, then prove the running local-turn path advances two real turns and emits same-run local_gate plus sight_avoid reposition or explicit blocked-no-cover evidence. If the two-turn artifact audit fails, the scenario is intentionally inconclusive rather than product closure.

steps.label: post_load_exposed_scout_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the exposed bandit scout/stalker fixture; this proves only startup/load and before-action footing
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later local-turn sight-avoidance artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: preflight_saved_active_scout_site_and_member_footing
steps.abort_reason: preflight saved bandit_live_world site did not prove an active scout group with findable saved active-member NPC footing
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world contains an active scout group, at least one active member id, and saved-overmap NPC records/position footing for those active members before local-turn proof starts; legacy fixture profile may be blank in saved metadata and must be proven later by same-run local_gate profile=camp_style artifact
steps.failure_rule: If the active scout group/member footing is missing, a later quiet local-gate/sight-avoid result cannot be trusted as product behavior. Saved profile is not required here because this legacy fixture omits it; runtime local_gate still must prove profile=camp_style.

steps.label: preflight_saved_game_turn_baseline
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved player turn counter is recorded before the two visible local turns
steps.failure_rule: If the starting turn cannot be read, later keypresses cannot prove actual local-turn advancement.

steps.label: disable_safe_mode_for_two_turn_sight_avoid_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode has been toggled so the two visible local turns can advance under player control
steps.failure_rule: If safe-mode toggling/input is unproven, subsequent turn advancement cannot be credited as controlled scenario action.

steps.label: advance_visible_turn_1_for_bandit_sight_avoid
steps.expected_visible_fact: first visible local turn after exposure has completed; final feature credit still depends on same-run sight_avoid artifact proving the bandit reacted through normal movement/hold-off rather than teleporting
steps.failure_rule: If the first visible turn is unproven, the two-turn sight-avoid window is not creditable.

steps.label: advance_visible_turn_2_for_bandit_sight_avoid
steps.expected_visible_fact: second visible local turn after exposure has completed; feature credit requires the same-run artifact to show adjacent distance=1 reposition or an explicit hold/abort/blocked-no-cover outcome by this point
steps.failure_rule: If the second visible turn is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks a bounded sight-avoid reaction, this scenario is not product proof.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_two_turn_sight_avoid_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the two-turn sight-avoid probe, proving the game remained responsive after the bounded local-turn check
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as a clean audited probe.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_two_turn_sight_avoid_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the bandit sight-avoid probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

steps.label: audit_saved_game_turn_delta_after_two_turn_sight_avoid_probe
steps.abort_reason: saved player turn counter did not advance by at least two turns after the bounded visible-turn probe
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved player turn counter advanced by at least two turns after save/quit, proving the actual game turn path advanced
steps.failure_rule: If the saved turn delta is below two, this run cannot prove the two-turn sight-avoid window even if keys were pressed.

steps.label: audit_two_turn_bandit_local_gate_and_sight_avoid_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run two-turn live path did not emit claim-scoped bandit local_gate plus bounded sight-avoid reposition or explicit blocked-no-cover artifact

evidence_contract.claim: bandit scout/stalker sight-avoidance reacts through the real live local-turn path by at most two visible turns with an adjacent non-teleport reposition or explicit hold/abort/blocked-no-cover report
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for bandit behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, input ledger, both visible local-turn ledger rows, the two-turn artifact audit, local_gate report, claim-scoped bandit sight_avoid artifact, exposure state, hold-off posture, local_contact=yes, active_job=scout, adjacent distance=1 reposition, and non-shakedown/non-combat fields are not all green/matched.
